g.text: Two types of back stresses arising from homogeneous and gradientnanotwins

Bundles of concentrated dislocations (BCDs)that uniquely arise from gradient nanotwinsMisorientation produced by GNDs•Back stress stemming from homogeneous nanotwinsIncompatibility between neighboring twinsPlastic strain gradient depends on twin thickness•Back stress stemming from gradient nanotwinsIncompatibility between twins with different thicknesses and strengths Plastic strain gradient depends on structural gradient
